description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical body constructed from vertical wooden staves, bound together by four evenly spaced metal hoops. The wood has a natural, medium-brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The metal hoops are dark gray and slightly weathered, providing structural reinforcement and a traditional look. Both ends of the barrel are flat and closed, with the top and bottom made from the same wood as the staves. The barrel is shown both upright and lying on its side, indicating its versatility in placement. There are no visible handles, spigots, or markings, and the overall design suggests it is intended for storage or decorative use in urban or semi-industrial settings.
description: A medium-sized, classic wooden barrel with metal hoops, featuring a rustic finish and no visible handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view of an upright wooden barrel, showing the circular top and metal hoops encircling the staves.
description_view_1: Side-by-side view of one upright and one horizontal barrel, highlighting the flat ends and the full cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Top-down view of a horizontal barrel in front of an upright one, emphasizing the curvature and the metal hoops.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the open end of a horizontal barrel and the closed top of an upright barrel, with clear visibility of the wood grain and hoops.
